message:
Expand badge color palette to match tags

Badges now support the same 9-color palette as tags (blue, lightblue,
purple, pink, orange, yellow, red, green, and grey) for improved design
system consistency. Each color variant includes both solid and
transparent border options. Updated skill documentation to reflect badge
color support for better discoverability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+---
+
+Badges now support the same 9 colors as tags: blue, lightblue, purple, pink, orange, yellow, red, green, and grey. Each color has solid and transparent border variants. The skill description now includes both "tags" and "badges" terms for discoverability.
